name: Gallery Remix
description: Put your face into any image you picked from the gallery — AI face swap with identity preservation

default_prompts.image_edit_male:
REFERENCE IMAGE = STYLE, AESTHETICS, VISUAL DIRECTION, AND CREATIVE INSPIRATION ONLY

USER FACE IMAGE = MALE IDENTITY, FACIAL FEATURES, AND BODY REFERENCE

DO NOT EDIT, MODIFY, CLONE, RECREATE, OR TRANSFORM THE REFERENCE IMAGE.

Generate a completely new, original image inspired by the reference image's artistic direction, visual quality, atmosphere, composition principles, lighting techniques, color palette, styling, mood, rendering approach, environmental design, camera language, and creative excellence.

The reference image serves exclusively as a style and quality guide.

The user image serves as the exclusive identity source.

Create a realistic male subject whose identity is fully derived from the user image. Preserve facial structure, facial geometry, eye shape, eye spacing, nose structure, mouth shape, jawline, skin texture, facial proportions, age appearance, body proportions, natural facial asymmetry, and all unique identifying characteristics with maximum fidelity.

The generated male must be instantly recognizable as the same individual shown in the user image.

Generate a completely new composition, new camera angle, new framing, new scene arrangement, and new image while maintaining the visual sophistication and artistic excellence demonstrated by the reference image.

If the reference image contains no visible face, a partially visible face, a masked face, a stylized face, an anime face, a non-human character, or no character at all, use only its style, atmosphere, wardrobe inspiration, visual quality, environment, and artistic direction. Never derive identity from the reference image.

IDENTITY PRESERVATION PRIORITY:

* Maximum facial identity retention
* Accurate male facial structure
* Accurate body proportions
* Realistic human anatomy
* Natural skin details
* Natural facial asymmetry
* Realistic eyes
* Recognizable facial geometry
* Consistent identity across all generated elements

PROFESSIONAL PRODUCTION QUALITY:

* Elite commercial photography
* Luxury fashion campaign quality
* Hollywood promotional photography
* Magazine-cover quality
* Award-winning cinematic imagery
* Professional studio production
* Physically accurate lighting
* Real-world optics and lens behavior
* Authentic textures and materials
* Natural depth and dimensionality
* High-end camera realism

QUALITY STANDARDS:

* Photorealistic
* Not AI-looking
* No plastic skin
* No waxy texture
* No oversmoothing
* No CGI appearance
* No artificial eyes
* No identity drift
* No facial distortion
* No anatomical errors
* No extra fingers
* No duplicate features
* No low-resolution details
* No rendering artifacts

Create a premium, world-class, production-ready image that appears professionally photographed rather than AI-generated.

Priority Order:

1. User Identity Accuracy
2. Male Identity Preservation
3. Photorealism
4. Professional Quality
5. Reference Style Fidelity
6. Artistic Excellence

Result: A completely new image featuring the user's authentic male identity, rendered with elite professional quality and inspired by the reference image's visual style, atmosphere, and artistic direction.

steps.name: image_edit
steps.description: AI-powered face swap onto the selected gallery image with identity preservation
